name: Annabelle

notes: The current restaurant-issued July 11, 2026 dinner/dessert menu contains 27 products; the current Bar Bites page contains six, for 33 total across six categories.
All 26 frozen rows were reconciled: 21 map to current products, four are stale seasonal dishes, and Tentsuyu Sauce is a shifted-description artifact. Twelve current products were omitted.
The corrected catalog retains all 33 current products and strips display-only allergen suffixes from product names while preserving them as structured evidence.
Annabelle explicitly defines item-scoped dairy, gluten, nuts, and shellfish codes. Thirty current products have directly supported positive signals; three Bar Bites remain unavailable.
Sixteen of 21 matched frozen allergen outcomes were wrong. The repair includes the published labels, direct item ingredients, and no negative or cross-contact assurances.
The restaurant's generic nuts code does not identify species; it is represented as a non-species-specific tree-nut signal and is not promoted into a peanut-negative claim.
Coconut is not mapped to tree-nut because current FDA guidance no longer lists coconut as a major tree nut.
The Squarespace menu layout stores continuation descriptions in price slots and prices in adjacent empty rows. The frozen parser lost five continuations and promoted Tentsuyu Sauce into a product.
The reproducible parser joins only adjacent continuation fields, consumes price-only layout rows, parses six Bar Bites from heading/description pairs, and asserts the current 27/6 source shape.
Oyster mushrooms are protected from shellfish matching, cashew cream from dairy matching, and coconut from obsolete tree-nut classification.

sourceAttempts.outcome: HTTP 200. Parsed 27 products from a recent menu explicitly updated July 11, 2026, plus its item-level allergen legend.
HTTP 200. Current navigation identifies this historical slug as Bar Menu; parsed six Bar Bites products.
HTTP 200. Confirmed current restaurant identity, address, hours, and menu navigation.
Targeted official-domain review found the published item legend but no separate complete allergen matrix or cross-contact disclosure.
HTTP 200. Current FDA guidance confirms coconut is no longer listed as a major tree nut.

findings.summary: The frozen parser promoted Tentsuyu Sauce into a standalone product, attached MF Sliders content to it, and lost continuation text on five matched dinner/dessert rows.
findings.resolution: Implemented and tested layout-aware dinner and heading-aware Bar Bites parsers.

findings.summary: Four frozen seasonal products are stale and twelve current products, including all six Bar Bites, were absent from the app.
findings.resolution: Replaced the frozen catalog with all 33 current restaurant-issued products.

findings.summary: Sixteen matched products had missing or overstated signals because the frozen extraction did not correctly apply Annabelle's item-scoped allergen legend.
findings.resolution: Applied each published code only to its marked item and combined it with direct item ingredient evidence.

findings.summary: Prime Angus Teres Major was falsely marked shellfish from oyster mushrooms, and Crispy Broccolini was falsely marked dairy from cashew cream.
findings.resolution: Added phrase-aware protections and focused regression tests for both false-positive patterns.

findings.summary: Snapper was marked tree-nut solely from coconut, which current FDA guidance no longer includes in its major-allergen Tree Nut List.
findings.resolution: Removed the unsupported tree-nut signal while retaining direct fish and lobster/shellfish signals.

repairs.summary: Rebuilt Annabelle's current catalog and corrected structural, source-semantic, substring, and allergen-taxonomy errors.

notes: Frozen live target SHA-256 before repair: f497c72979f4a7c2ab317a697aeb3fd58e3ac510dc2b106a7e7d75764a96db99.
Live non-target restaurant projection SHA-256 remained c6f68e5d208522a1b8bcb8111adc536ccede0a5fc24ffe6607f7e97aa3a76a8c.
A second target-only repair run produced the same target hash and retained exactly one Annabelle repair note.
The repaired repository contains 113753 live menu items; the top-level historical itemCount field was intentionally not used as evidence.
